name: Elemental Equilibrium
description: Notes A generally weaker version of the Exalted God’s Horn, this limited ring gives some HP, MP, and great offenses when above 90% HP.
effects: Fury of Flame and Storm: Gain ATT Boost (+5 ATT) and DEX Boost (+5 DEX) while attacking if your health is above 90% Max HP. Perseverance of Land and Water: Gain DEF Boost (+5 DEF) and VIT Boost (+15 VIT) for 10 seconds when taking damage below 60% Max HP. Cooldown: 15 seconds
